demographics.living_situation: lives independently, presenting from a private home

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The condom broke two and a half days ago with someone I don't know, I'm terrified I've caught HIV, and I know I only have hours left to get the pills.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Wants to be seen urgently today because he believes there is a strict time limit to start the preventive medication and he could not get in to an emergency department or clinic earlier.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two and a half days ago (roughly 60 hours), when a condom broke during sex
symptom_narrative.duration: the worry has been constant since it happened and has got worse as time passes
symptom_narrative.character: no physical symptoms as such — he describes overwhelming fear and cannot stop thinking about the time running out
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: says he is 'panicking', feels his heart pounding and cannot sit still
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since the event, worse the closer he gets to what he believes is a deadline
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: watching the clock and feeling the time window closing
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fevers, no rash, no sore throat, no swollen glands — he says he feels physically well but is extremely anxious and sweaty
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: pacing, tearful, fixated on the elapsed time; otherwise independent

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: no ongoing medical conditions that he knows of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: reports the exposure was a single encounter with a casual partner he does not know and cannot contact; says he had a negative HIV test about three months ago; denies any kidney problems

communication_style.typical_message_style: urgent, repetitive, keeps returning to the time window and the fear of a permanent infection

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported from memory, not measured this encounter
